languages.text: Units in the area suffer Conductivity. Units with Conductivity suffer <u>+100%</u> more Shock damage. The unit suffers Shock damage when the generator is overloaded. The unit gains {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g} at the start of their turn while standing in the melted puddle connected to the generator. When the generator is overcharged, the unit gains {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}.

When the generator is overcharged, the unit gains {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}.

languages.text: This creature suffers +100% {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}. At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, while standing in a melted puddle that is a part of an electric chain to the generator, it suffers shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and gains {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}. If the generator is overcharged, all creatures within the puddle suffer heavy shock damage and gain {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.

languages.text: Это существо получает на 100% больше {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g}. Если в конце своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} оно стоит в жидкости, являющейся частью электрической цепи к генератору, то получает электрический {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} и +{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Если генератор перегружен, все существа в жидкости получают значительный электрический урон и +{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.

Если генератор перегружен, все существа в жидкости получают значительный электрический урон и +{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.

languages.text: 该生物承受+100%{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，若该生物处于与发电机相连的电链回路中的熔化水洼内，则受到电击{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}并获得{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。若发电机处于过度充能状态，则水洼中的所有生物受到高额电击伤害并获得{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。

At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, while standing in a melted puddle that is a part of an electric chain to the generator, it suffers shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and gains {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}. If the generator is overcharged, all creatures within the puddle suffer heavy shock damage and gain {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 该生物承受+100%{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，若该生物处于与发电机相连的电链回路中的熔化水洼内，则受到电击{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}并获得{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。若发电机处于过度充能状态，则水洼中的所有生物受到高额电击伤害并获得{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。

languages.text: La créature subit +100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g}. À la fin de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, si elle se tient dans une flaque fondue qui fait partie d'une chaîne électrique vers le générateur, elle subit des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} d'électrocution et gagne {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}. Si le générateur est surchargé, toutes les créatures dans la flaque subissent d'importants dégâts d'électrocution et gagnent {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}.

If the generator is overcharged, all creatures within the puddle suffer heavy shock damage and gain {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.

À la fin de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, si elle se tient dans une flaque fondue qui fait partie d'une chaîne électrique vers le générateur, elle subit des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} d'électrocution et gagne {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}. Si le générateur est surchargé, toutes les créatures dans la flaque subissent d'importants dégâts d'électrocution et gagnent {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}.

languages.text: Esta criatura sufre +100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g}. Al final de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, mientras esté en un charco derretido que forme parte de una cadena eléctrica al generador, sufre {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} de conmoción y gana {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}. Si el generador se sobrecarga, todas las criaturas del charco sufren una gran cantidad de daño de conmoción y ganan {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.

If the generator is overcharged, all creatures within the puddle suffer heavy shock damage and gain {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.

Al final de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, mientras esté en un charco derretido que forme parte de una cadena eléctrica al generador, sufre {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} de conmoción y gana {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}. languages.text: Diese Kreatur erleidet +100 % {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}. Steht sie am Ende ihres {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} in einer geschmolzenen Pfütze, die Teil einer elektrischen Verbindung mit dem Generator ist, erleidet sie Schock{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}schaden{/g} und erhält {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}. Ist der Generator überladen, erleiden alle Kreaturen in der Pfütze schweren Schockschaden und erhalten {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}.

If the generator is overcharged, all creatures within the puddle suffer heavy shock damage and gain {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.

Ist der Generator überladen, erleiden alle Kreaturen in der Pfütze schweren Schockschaden und erhalten {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}.

languages.text: Bu yaratık, +%100 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarına{/g} maruz kalır. {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Turunun{/g} sonunda, jeneratöre giden elektrik zincirlerinden birinin parçası olan erimiş birikintinin içinde dururken şok {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasarına{/g} maruz kalır ve {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır. Jeneratör aşırı yüklenmişse birikintinin içinde duran tüm yaratıklar, ağır şok hasarına maruz kalır ve {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.

If the generator is overcharged, all creatures within the puddle suffer heavy shock damage and gain {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.

Jeneratör aşırı yüklenmişse birikintinin içinde duran tüm yaratıklar, ağır şok hasarına maruz kalır ve {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.

languages.text: このクリーチャーは+100%の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}感電ダメージ{/g}を受ける。自分の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}の終わりに、発電機につながれた感電のプールにいる間、感電{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を受け、{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}潜在エネルギー{/g}を得る。発電機が過負荷状態であれば、プールにいるすべてのクリーチャーは重度の感電ダメージを受け、{uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}潜在エネルギー{/g}を得る。
languages.original_text: This creature suffers +100% {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}. At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, while standing in a melted puddle that is a part of an electric chain to the generator, it suffers shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and gains {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}. If the generator is overcharged, all creatures within the puddle suffer heavy shock damage and gain {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
